caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white collared shirt under a dark vest and a red tie, stands before a microphone and sings while playing an acoustic guitar. He is positioned in front of a background of vertical wooden slats. In the foreground, several people are viewed from behind; they include a woman with curly blonde hair, a woman with long brown hair, and a person wearing a dark purple garment. A black microphone stand is positioned in front of the man. To the right, a black electronic device sits on a surface. The white text "ORCA" is superimposed on the lower right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man continues to sing and play his guitar, while the audience remains still, facing him. There are minimal changes in the positioning of the people and equipment across the sequence.
